[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@fgv/ts-chocolate](./ts-chocolate.md) &gt; [IngredientQuery](./ts-chocolate.ingredientquery.md)

## IngredientQuery class

Fluent query builder for ingredients. Allows chaining filters to build complex queries.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class IngredientQuery 
```
